scripts.dev: npm run env:setup && concurrently -n "api,web,shared,const" -c "cyan,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev -w api" "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w @tbms/shared-types" "npm run dev -w @tbms/shared-constants"
scripts.build:do:web: npm run build -w @tbms/shared-types && npm run build -w @tbms/shared-constants && npm run build -w web
scripts.build:do:api: npm run build -w @tbms/shared-types && npm run build -w @tbms/shared-constants && npm exec -w api -- prisma generate && npm run build -w api
scripts.migrate:deploy:api: npm exec -w api -- prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:migrate:dev: npm exec -w api -- prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:migrate:status: npm exec -w api -- prisma migrate status
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: npm exec -w api -- prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:migrate:reset: npm exec -w api -- prisma migrate reset
scripts.prisma:db:push: npm exec -w api -- prisma db push
scripts.prisma:seed: npm exec -w api -- prisma db seed
scripts.prisma:seed:core: SEED_CORE_DATA=true npm exec -w api -- prisma db seed
scripts.prisma:seed:demo: SEED_CORE_DATA=true SEED_DEMO_DATA=true npm exec -w api -- prisma db seed
